description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, rectangular structure with a slightly curved profile, typical of classic arcade machines. The front panel houses a large, square display screen with a visible crack, surrounded by a dark bezel. Below the screen, the control panel is equipped with two red joysticks and several colored buttons, arranged for two-player gameplay. The lower front section includes a coin slot mechanism and a service panel. The side panels are painted in a muted blue with visible wear and weathering, while the rest of the cabinet is predominantly black with a matte finish. The back panel is plain and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design of the cabinet.
description: A weathered, classic arcade game cabinet with a cracked screen, dual joysticks, colored buttons, and a coin slot, featuring blue side panels and a black matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cracked display screen, dual red joysticks, colored control buttons, and a coin slot on the lower panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue, slightly worn side panel and the cabinet's curved profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, dark back panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the blue, weathered side panel and the cabinet's overall silhouette.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, square-shaped, slightly recessed with a visible bezel and a cracked surface
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and six colored buttons arranged in two rows, suitable for two-player side-by-side play, with a simple color scheme of red, yellow, and green buttons
